titleStmt.title: SII 9.80: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 80. (A.R. No. 87 of 1904). ON THE 3RD SLAB SET UP IN THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE NARASIMHASVAMI SHRINE IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 940, Kāḷayukta, Pushya, śu. 13, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta. The details correspond to A.D. 1018 December 23 Tuesday, not Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti having occurred on the 24th. It belongs to the reign of the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalla-Jayasiṅghadēva (II), whose feudatory Jagadēkamalla-Noḷambapallava-Permānaḍi alias Udayādityadēva is stated to have been ruling over Gaṅgavāḍi ninety-six-thousand, Kadaṁbaḷike thousand, Kōgaḷi fivehundred, five villages of Māsiyavāḍi hundred-and-forty, Ballakunde three-hundred and Kuḍihāra seventy, in Eḍadoṟe two-thousand. It records that, under the orders of Uda yāditya, the Pergaḍe Narasiṇghayya went to Bāḷguḷi and, washing the feet of Sōmasiṅgha-Bhaḷāra in the presence of the Mahājanas of Bāḷguḷi, Bikki, the Manneya of Bikiga seventy and Bīrabhaṭṭa, made a grant of some plots of land for offerings to the god Kalidēvasvāmi, for the maintenance of the Dēvadāsis and their band, for servants and for the feeding of teachers and students. Narasiṅghayya is praised for his bravery. The gift was made on the occasion of Udayāditya's visit to the tīrtha of Pampāpura. The king is stated to have been ruling from Kampuli.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
©svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ mallikāmōdaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalla jayasiṅghadēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivri
ddhige salluttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda pallavānvaya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ palla
vakuḷatiḷakaṁ maṇḍaḷikalalāṭalōcanaṁ ghaṭeyoḍegaṇḍaṁ kadanaka(ṁ)ṇṭhīravanamōghavākyaṁ kāṁcīpu
ravarēśvaraṁ śrīmajjagadēkamallanoḻaṁbapallavapermānaḍigaḷenisi nagaḻdudayādityadēvarggaṁgavāḍi
toṁbhattaṟusāyiramuṁ kadaṁbaḻike sāyiramuṁ kōgaḷiyaynūṟuṁ māsiyavāḍi nūṟanālvatta
ṟoḷagaṇa paṁcagrāmaṁgaḷuṁ ballakuṁde mūnūṟuveḍedoṟicchāsiradoḷagaṇa kuḍihāra
veḻpattuvaṁ nidhinidhānanikṣēpaduṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanangeydu tuṁgabhadreya taḍi
ya kaṁpulibīḍinoḷiḻdu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttira © sakabhūpāḷakāḷā
krāntanāmadhēya saṁvatsaraṁga 940 ttanaya kāḷayuktasaṁvatsaraṁ pravartise tadvarṣābhyaṁ
tarada puṣya suddha 13 Ādityavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyuṁ vyatīpātavuṁ kūḍi
daṁdudayādityadēvarpaṁpāpurada tīrtthakke bijayaṁgeydu tatkāladoḷ bāḷguḷiya kalidēvasvā
mige bikkiganeḻpattaṟoḷagaṇa nāraṇōjhara śaṁkarōjhara nācimayyana keṟegaḷo
ḷagāgi lōgēśvarada polada caturāghāṭaśīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷḷa bhūmiyaṁ dēvara nivēdyakka
ṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ tapōdhanasatrakkaṁ pa(ṁ)nnirvvarssūḷeyerggaṁ ssūḷevaḷagaṁ vaṁcigaṁgaṁ paṟekāṟarggaṁ
pātrakkaṁ dēsigachātrabhōjanakkameṁdu samakaṭṭi trikāḷabhōgaṁ naḍevaṁtāgi yamaniyamasvā
dhyāyadhyānamaunajapahōmānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇarappaśrīmatsōmasiṅghabhaḷārara kālaṁ
kaḻci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvanamasyamāge kuḍe tadīyasvāmiya besadiṁda svasti samastarājyabha
ranirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamāna mānōnnataprabhamaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitraya
saṁpannarappa śrīmatperggaḍe narasiṅghayya sōmasiṅghabhaḷāraranoḍagoṇḍu bāḷguḷige vaṁdu
svastyudadhiparivritavikhyātōttuṁgamagāṁgēya yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇajapahōmānu
ṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇarvviśiṣṭajanāśrayarvvidyāśritāśrayaracintyamahārṇnavarccāḻukyaca
krēśvaradattiyappa śrīmadbāḷguḷiya mahājanamayvadiṁbaruvaṁ bikkiganeḻpattara maṁneya
bikkiyuṁ bīrabhaṭṭanumaṁ bāḷguḷige varisi kalidēvasvāmiya mahājanadadhyakṣa(da)doḷ
bikki kaḻcale bīrabhaṭṭaneṟeye sōmasinghabhaḷārara kālaṁ kaḻcisi dhāreyaneṟeyisi
keṟegoḍaṁgeydasavaṁdhavaṁ koṇḍa keṟegaḷaṁ paḍisalisuvar lōgēsvarada
catussīme mūḍal nāraṇōjhara keṟeya mūḍaṇa kōḍiyiṁ teṁka bare berkkudoṟe
yiṁ saṁkarōjara keṟeya mūḍaṇa kōḍiyiṁ teṁkaloṟudaradiṁ paḍuva bare kerggalliṁ ku
duregaliṁda vaḍḍagalliṁ maṇiyereyiṁ paḍuvalaḍḍaviḻivana keṟeyiṁ baḍaga bare nīrgguṁ
dada bhaṇḍivaṭṭeyiṁdānedoṟeviḍidaṁte nāraṇōjhara keṟeya mūḍaṇa kōḍiyaṁ
kūḍittī dharmava pratipāḷisida mahāpuruṣaṁ vāraṇāsiyalsahasra brāhmaṇa
rgubhayamukhi sahasrakavileyaṁ koṭṭa dānaphaḷavī dharmavanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsiyo
ḷinituvanaḷida pātaka © ślōka . bahabhirvvasudhā bhukta rājabhissagarādibhiryyasya
yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi
rvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ © kaṁda . kalidēvasvāmige kaṁpileyoḷtaṁnāḷdani
tta dattiyanitaṁ palaraṟiye paḍadu mattaṁ śiḷasāsanadoḷviśēṣadiṁ bareyisida © Aṁtakanāṁtariba
lake murāṁtakanudyōgadeḍege śauryyōcitadoḷkoṁtisutanenipa mahāśrīmaṁtana maganalte
negaḻdanalte narasiṅghayya © dēvara .
Digital edition of SII 9.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
